since_last: 62% of 84 AI names green; AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads +1.14%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 62% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.72% · BTC -1.27% · Gold -0.18% · Nasdaq100 +1.26%. 62% of 84 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure is doing the heavy lifting at +1.14%.

cards.headline: AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at +1.14%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -2.82%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: CEVA is the standout at +10.44%
cards.body: Leaders: CEVA +10.44%, INOD +6.16%, OKTA +5.08%, HPE +4.66%, SYM +4.02%. Laggards: MU -5.26%, MRVL -4.63%, AMAT -4.41%, LRCX -4.39%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.82% at $159.1
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.82% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
